title: Tunable Chaos in the Finite Mean SYK Model
summary: The complex Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model, featuring fermions with all-to-all interactions, serves as a dual paradigm for understanding non-Fermi liquid behavior and the holographic nature of charged black holes. Two defining characteristics of the standard SYK model are its maximal chaos (Lyapunov exponent $λ_{\mathrm{L}}=2πT$ at temperature $T$), and its finite zero-temperature residual entropy. While previous studies have largely focused on couplings drawn from a zero-mean Gaussian distribution, we investigate a generalized model with a finite mean-to-standard-deviation ratio, $g\equiv J_{0}/δJ$ of the coupling distribution in order to get deeper insight into the evolution of chaos. We find that increasing $g$ yields the following effects: (i) The system remains a fast scrambler with $λ_{\mathrm{L}}=A~T$, but with a suppressed coefficient $A<2π$. (ii) In the limit $g\to \infty$, out-of-time-ordered correlators (OTOCs) no longer exhibit exponential growth with $λ_{\mathrm{L}}\simeq 0$. (iii) The spectral correlations indicative of late-time chaos maintain Wigner-Dyson level spacing statistics for all values of $g$. (iv) The system preserves a finite residual entropy, albeit with reduced magnitude, for all $g$ values. We conclude that in this generalized SYK model, there is a chaotic to non-chaotic crossover. Moreover different measures of chaos decouple, demonstrating that the presence of finite residual entropy does not strictly imply maximal chaos.

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有有限均值耦合的广义SYK模型，发现增大均值与标准差之比g会抑制混沌（Lyapunov指数系数A<2π），但保留Wigner-Dyson能级统计和有限残余熵，表明不同混沌度量之间存在解耦，残余熵并不必然意味着最大混沌。
AI.motivation: 标准SYK模型假设耦合服从零均值高斯分布，具有最大混沌和有限残余熵两个核心特征。作者希望探究耦合分布的非零均值如何影响混沌行为，以更深入理解混沌演化机制。
AI.method: 引入参数g=J₀/δJ（耦合均值与标准差之比），研究广义SYK模型在有限g下的混沌性质，包括计算Lyapunov指数、OTOC行为、能级统计和残余熵等。
AI.result: (i) Lyapunov指数λ_L=A·T，系数A<2π；(ii) g→∞时OTOC不再指数增长，λ_L≈0；(iii) 所有g值下保持Wigner-Dyson能级统计；(iv) 残余熵保持有限但数值减小。
AI.conclusion: 广义SYK模型存在混沌到非混沌的交叉，不同混沌度量（如Lyapunov指数、能级统计）之间出现解耦，残余熵的存在并不严格意味着最大混沌。

title: Hallmark Signatures of Electronic Pairing in Two-Photon Two-Electron Coincidence Angle-Resolved Photoemission Spectroscopy
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Supplementary Material available upon request
summary: Understanding strongly correlated quantum materials remains a central challenge in condensed matter physics and materials science. While angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) has become an indispensable probe of single-quasiparticle excitations, it accesses electronic correlations only indirectly. Here we show that unlike one-photon in, two-electrons out coincidence ARPES ($γ\!\rightarrow\!2e$ 2eARPES), the two-photon in, two-electron out $2γ\!\rightarrow\!2e$ 2eARPES provides a direct and unambiguous probe of electronic pairing. We establish this on general theoretical grounds and substantiate it through large-scale numerical simulations of strongly correlated models with both paired and unpaired ground states. The key result is a model-independent separation in the $(ω_1,ω_2)$ plane of the two photoelectrons' energies, between signal from electrons emitted from the \emph{same} pair and signal from electrons emitted from \emph{different} pairs; this follows from energy conservation alone and is independent of any material-specific assumptions. Our findings demonstrate that $2γ\!\rightarrow\!2e$ 2eARPES can identify pairing and extract the pair binding energy as well as the energy of the 'glue' boson without any sophisticated data analysis or complementary measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双光子-双电子出射的2eARPES（$2γ\!\rightarrow\!2e$）可直接、无歧义地探测强关联材料中的电子配对，并通过理论推导和大规模数值模拟验证了其模型无关性，能直接提取配对结合能和玻色子"胶水"能量。
AI.motivation: 传统ARPES只能间接探测电子关联，而单光子-双电子出射的2eARPES也无法直接探测配对。作者希望找到一种能直接、明确探测电子配对的实验手段。
AI.method: 基于理论推导建立$2γ\!\rightarrow\!2e$ 2eARPES与电子配对的直接联系，并在强关联模型（含配对/非配对基态）上进行大规模数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 光电子能量$(ω_1,ω_2)$平面上，来自"同一对"电子和来自"不同对"电子的信号在能量守恒约束下实现模型无关的分离。该方法可直接提取配对结合能及"胶水"玻色子能量，无需复杂数据分析或补充实验。
AI.conclusion: $2γ\!\rightarrow\!2e$ 2eARPES是一种直接、无歧义的电子配对探针，为研究强关联量子材料中的配对机制提供了全新的实验范式。

title: $d$-wave altermagnetism revealed by resonant inelastic X-ray scattering
summary: Altermagnetism defines a third fundamental class of collinear magnetic order, featuring compensated magnetic moments with antiparallel spin alignment, yet lifted Kramers degeneracy without the need for relativistic spin-orbit coupling. Its ability to host spin-polarized electronic bands and unconventional chiral magnons makes it a promising platform for functional materials. However, experimental verification has proven challenging; while circular dichroism in resonant inelastic X-ray scattering (RIXS) has been suggested as a signature of chiral magnons, it remains controversial whether this effect is an intrinsic property of altermagnetism or an artifact of experimental geometry. In this work, we resolve this debate and provide unambiguous experimental evidence of $d$-wave altermagnetism in the strongly correlated Lieb-lattice magnet La$_2$O$_3$Mn$_2$Se$_2$. The RIXS spectra exhibit a $d$-wave-symmetry circular dichroism in the magnetic excitations that vanishes in the paramagnetic phase. Through RIXS-operator symmetry analysis and exact-diagonalization calculations, we prove that the observed dichroism is a direct consequence of altermagnetic symmetry constraints, independent of magnon branch splitting. Our results provide definitive evidence for the experimental realization of $d$-wave altermagnetism in La$_2$O$_3$Mn$_2$Se$_2$ and establish circularly polarized RIXS as a highly symmetry-sensitive spectroscopic framework for detecting magnetic phases that evade conventional probes.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过圆偏振共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）实验，在强关联Lieb晶格磁体La₂O₃Mn₂Se₂中发现了d波交变磁性（altermagnetism）的确凿证据，证明了圆二色性是交变磁性对称性的直接结果，而非实验几何假象。
AI.motivation: 交变磁性作为第三类基本共线磁序，具有自旋极化能带和手性磁振子等独特性质，是功能材料的重要平台。然而，实验中如何确凿验证交变磁性一直存在争议——特别是RIXS中的圆二色性信号究竟是交变磁性的内禀属性还是实验几何导致的假象，这一问题亟待澄清。
AI.method: 采用圆偏振RIXS实验测量La₂O₃Mn₂Se₂的磁激发谱，结合RIXS算符对称性分析和精确对角化计算，从对称性角度证明观测到的d波圆二色性是交变磁对称约束的直接结果，与磁振子分支劈裂无关。
AI.result: RIXS谱在磁激发中展现出d波对称的圆二色性，该信号在顺磁相中消失。理论分析证实该二色性直接源于交变磁对称性，排除了实验几何假象的可能性，提供了d波交变磁性的明确实验证据。
AI.conclusion: 该工作确证了La₂O₃Mn₂Se₂中d波交变磁性的实验实现，并建立了圆偏振RIXS作为一种高对称性敏感的光谱学框架，可用于探测传统手段难以检测的磁相。

title: Mimicry of chaos and $k$-design in higher order OTOCs of Luttinger liquids
summary: Out-of-time-order correlators (OTOCs) provide a fundamental metric for quantum chaos, but capturing the fine structure of information scrambling requires exploring their higher-order generalizations. Here, we systematically investigate the sequence of higher-order OTOCs in a Luttinger liquid and its lattice realization, the XXZ Heisenberg chain. Using bosonization and numerics, we extract the full temporal dynamics of the first three OTOCs, revealing that they rapidly erase memory of the initial state, and quickly saturate to their steady state values. Strikingly, we show that calculating the late time saturation values for the entire sequence of higher-order OTOCs maps exactly onto determining the partition function of a non-Hermitian Harper model. Through this mapping, we demonstrate that for moderately strong interactions, the steady-state OTOCs become parametrically small up to the seventh order, mimicking higher $k$-design. Our results reveal that Luttinger liquids exhibit an unexpectedly profound degree of apparent scrambling when viewed through the lens of higher-order OTOCs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了Luttinger液体及其晶格实现（XXZ Heisenberg链）中的高阶离序时间关联函数（OTOCs），发现它们能迅速擦除初始态记忆并达到稳态值。通过将高阶OTOC的稳态值映射到非厄米Harper模型的配分函数，证明中等强度相互作用下稳态OTOCs到第七阶都参数化地小，表现出类似高阶k-设计的量子混沌特征，揭示了Luttinger液体在信息置乱方面的深刻程度。
AI.motivation: OTOC是量子混沌的基本度量，但捕捉信息置乱的精细结构需要探索其高阶推广。目前对高阶OTOC在相互作用系统中的完整动力学行为理解有限，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用玻色化方法结合数值计算，提取了Luttinger液体和XXZ链中前三阶OTOC的完整时间动力学；通过数学映射将高阶OTOC的稳态值与非厄米Harper模型的配分函数关联起来。
AI.result: 高阶OTOC迅速擦除初始态记忆并饱和到稳态值；将稳态值的计算映射为非厄米Harper模型配分函数；中等强度相互作用下，稳态OTOCs到第七阶都参数化地小。
AI.conclusion: Luttinger液体通过高阶OTOC的视角展现出出乎意料的深度置乱能力，其行为类似于高阶k-设计，表明这类可积系统也具有丰富的量子混沌特征。

title: Bayesian Sampling of Structural Ensembles: The Role of Ensemble-Counting Measures
summary: Structural ensemble refinement is widely used to integrate molecular simulations with experimental measurements. While most applications focus on the maximum-a-posteriori (MAP) ensemble, Bayesian sampling of the posterior distribution can provide uncertainty estimates and posterior averages for arbitrary observables. A notable step in this direction was introduced by the Bayesian Energy Landscape Tilting (BELT) framework, where sampling is performed on a family of maximum-entropy ensembles parametrized by Lagrange multipliers. Here, we show that Bayesian sampling in this setting requires an explicit choice of ensemble-counting measure. In particular, the flat measure in Lagrange-multiplier space used in the original BELT formulation leads to a posterior distribution that is formally non-normalizable for finite reference trajectories. We propose the Jeffreys measure as an invariant ensemble-counting prescription, restoring normalizability in the finite-sample situations considered here, and providing a consistent definition of posterior averages. Using both an analytically tractable Gaussian model and maximum-entropy refinement of RNA oligomer simulations, we compare different ensemble-counting measures and show that they can significantly affect Bayesian estimates. The resulting methodology has been implemented in the \texttt{MDRefine} software package.

AI.tldr: 本文指出BELT框架中贝叶斯采样需要使用合适的系综计数测度，提出Jeffreys测度以解决原框架中有限参考轨迹下后验分布不可归一化的问题，并在RNA模拟中验证了不同测度对贝叶斯估计的显著影响。
AI.motivation: 现有结构系综精修方法多关注最大后验估计，缺乏对后验分布的不确定性评估。BELT框架虽尝试进行贝叶斯采样，但其在拉格朗日乘子空间中使用的平坦测度导致有限参考轨迹下后验分布不可归一化，需要更合适的系综计数测度。
AI.method: 提出Jeffreys测度作为不变系综计数方案，恢复有限样本情况下后验分布的可归一化性；通过解析高斯模型和RNA寡聚体模拟的最大熵精修，比较不同系综计数测度的影响。
AI.result: Jeffreys测度可解决BELT框架中后验分布不可归一化问题；不同系综计数测度对贝叶斯估计结果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 系综计数测度是贝叶斯系综精修的关键选择，Jeffreys测度提供了一致且可归一化的后验分布定义，该研究已实现于MDRefine软件包中。

title: Stochastic Thermodynamics and SDE-based Generative Models
summary: SDE-based generative models, including diffusion models and the Schrödinger bridge, have found broad applications in signal processing tasks such as speech enhancement, image restoration, and time-series generation. This note presents a modeling framework for such models within the context of stochastic thermodynamics. The main results of this note are trajectory-level definitions of work, heat, and entropy production, along with a generalized Jarzynski identity and a second-law-like inequality. The proposed framework extends the original Jarzynski setup to accommodate time-dependent bath temperature and nonconservative driving forces. This thermodynamic perspective may deepen our understanding of diffusion models and the Schrödinger bridge from a nonequilibrium statistical mechanics viewpoint.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于随机热力学的SDE生成模型（扩散模型和薛定谔桥）建模框架，给出了轨迹层面的功、热和熵产生定义，以及广义Jarzynski等式和类似第二定律的不等式，将原始Jarzynski设置扩展到时变浴温和非保守驱动力。
AI.motivation: 现有SDE生成模型（扩散模型、薛定谔桥）在信号处理中应用广泛，但从非平衡统计力学角度理解其热力学性质的框架尚不完善，需要建立一个统一的热力学视角来加深对这些模型的理解。
AI.method: 在随机热力学背景下为SDE生成模型构建建模框架，提出轨迹层面的功、热和熵产生的定义，并推导广义Jarzynski等式和类似第二定律的不等式，同时将原始Jarzynski设置扩展至时变浴温和非保守驱动力。
AI.result: 给出了轨迹层面的功、热、熵产生定义，推导出广义Jarzynski等式和类似第二定律的不等式，成功将框架扩展到时变浴温和非保守驱动力场景。
AI.conclusion: 该热力学视角可能从非平衡统计力学的角度加深对扩散模型和薛定谔桥的理解，为SDE生成模型提供新的理论洞察。

title: Magnetic field induced transition from nodeless to nodal superconductivity in $β$-PdBi$_{2}$
summary: Recent tunneling measurements on $β$-PdBi$_2$ reported a magnetic field induced phase transition from a fully gapped to a nodal superconducting state. We develop a microscopic theory of superconductivity in this multi-band material, taking into account spin-orbit coupling and Zeeman splitting. We show that there are two attractive pairing channels in this system: an s-wave and a p-wave. At zero magnetic field, s-wave superconductivity wins. At a finite field, this channel becomes less favorable because Fermi surfaces split, and the gap symmetry changes to p-wave. We show that at a higher field, the excitation spectrum of a p-wave multi-band superconductor becomes gapless, with nodal points located in between the split Fermi surfaces. We argue that this behavior accounts for the experimentally observed field-induced nodal superconductivity in $β$-PdBi$_2$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微观理论解释了β-PdBi₂中磁场诱导从全能隙超导到节状超导的相变，指出该多带材料中存在s波和p波两个吸引配对通道：零场下s波胜出，有限场下费米面分裂导致s波失稳、p波占优，并在更高场下出现节状激发谱。
AI.motivation: 实验上观察到β-PdBi₂中磁场诱导超导态从全能隙到节状的相变，但缺乏微观理论解释，作者旨在构建一个多带超导微观理论以阐明该相变机制。
AI.method: 建立考虑自旋-轨道耦合和塞曼分裂的多带超导微观理论，分析不同配对通道（s波和p波）的竞争关系，计算不同磁场下的能隙结构和激发谱。
AI.result: 零磁场下s波超导占优；有限磁场下费米面分裂使s波不再有利，超导序转变为p波；更高磁场下p波多带超导体的激发谱出现无能隙节点，节点位于分裂的费米面之间。
AI.conclusion: 该理论成功解释了实验中观测到的磁场诱导节状超导现象，即从s波全能隙态到p波节状态的相变来源于两个配对通道的竞争与费米面分裂。

title: Electromagnetic Characterization of Magnetic Ring: Case of Circular Cross-Section Shape
summary: This paper introduces a comprehensive two-dimensional analytical model of a toroidal magnetic ring with circular cross-section under sinusoidal excitation. Applying Maxwell's equations in local polar coordinates within a complex permeability, the model derives analytical expressions for the internal magnetic field, magnetic flux, complex impedance, and total losses. It rigorously separates the contributions of eddy current losses, hysteresis losses, and winding losses, while explicitly incorporating the skin effect in the conductive core via Bessel functions. An expression for the apparent permeability is also provided, enabling the nonlinear core behavior to be mapped onto simplified linear material models. The resulting analytical model offers a computationally efficient and accurate foundation for standardized magnetic material characterization, such as Brockhaus and Iwatsu ring measurements, as a powerful alternative to 2D and 3D finite element analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了环形磁芯（圆形截面）在正弦激励下的二维解析模型，基于麦克斯韦方程和复数磁导率，推导了内部磁场、磁通、复阻抗和总损耗的解析表达式，并利用贝塞尔函数显式描述了集肤效应，分离了涡流损耗、磁滞损耗和绕组损耗，为标准化磁性材料表征（如Brockhaus和Iwatsu环测量）提供了高效准确的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有环形磁芯分析依赖2D/3D有限元仿真，计算成本高且不便于标准化表征；缺乏能够同时考虑集肤效应、分离各类损耗成分的解析模型。
AI.method: 在局部极坐标系中应用麦克斯韦方程，引入复数磁导率；推导磁场、磁通、复阻抗和损耗的解析表达式；利用贝塞尔函数显式刻画集肤效应；严格分离涡流损耗、磁滞损耗和绕组损耗；并提供视在磁导率表达式，将非线性行为映射到线性材料模型。
AI.result: 得到了内部磁场、磁通、复阻抗和总损耗的解析解；成功分离了涡流损耗、磁滞损耗和绕组损耗；贝塞尔函数形式准确捕捉了集肤效应；视在磁导率表达式实现了非线性向线性模型的映射。
AI.conclusion: 该解析模型计算高效且精度可靠，可作为Brockhaus和Iwatsu环等标准化测量的理论基础，是替代2D/3D有限元分析的强大工具。

title: Quantum Geometry and Topology of Bulk Plasmons in Weyl Metals
summary: We address the quantum geometric structure of plasmons in Fermi surfaces enclosing a topological charge. We demonstrate that Weyl fermion plasmons have monopole structure, are topological and have a finite vorticity $ζ=2\mathsf{C}_{\text{w}}$, where $\mathsf{C}_{\text{w}}$ is the Chern number of the Fermi surface enclosing the Weyl point. We show that these plasmons selectively couple to light linearly polarized along the plasmon effective dipole moment $\mathbf{d}$, which has quantum geometric origin and points along the direction of the plasmon center of mass momentum $\hat{\mathbf{Q}}$. We suggest that Weyl metal topological plasmons have distinctive optical properties compared to conventional plasmons.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了费米面包围拓扑荷时等离激元的量子几何结构，发现Weyl费米子等离激元具有单极子结构、拓扑性质及有限涡度，并表现出选择性光耦合等独特光学特性。
AI.motivation: 探究费米面在包围拓扑荷（如Weyl点）时，等离激元（plasmon）的量子几何结构及其拓扑性质，揭示其与传统等离激元不同的物理机制。
AI.method: 从量子几何角度出发，分析Weyl费米子等离激元的拓扑性质，计算其涡度（vorticity）与陈数（Chern number）的关系，并研究等离激元偶极矩与光耦合的选择性。
AI.result: Weyl费米子等离激元具有单极子（monopole）结构，涡度ζ=2C_w（C_w为费米面包围Weyl点的陈数）；等离激元选择性耦合线偏振光，偏振方向沿有效偶极矩d，该偶极矩起源于量子几何，指向等离激元质心动量方向。
AI.conclusion: Weyl金属拓扑等离激元相比传统等离激元具有独特的光学性质，为进一步探索拓扑材料中的等离激元光学响应提供了理论依据。

title: akaitools: A Python package for parsing and analyzing AkaiKKR electronic structure calculations
summary: The Korringa-Kohn-Rostoker (KKR) Green's function method is a first-principles electronic structure approach well suited to substitutionally disordered alloys through the Coherent Potential Approximation (CPA). AkaiKKR is a widely used implementation, known for efficient treatment of metallic systems and their magnetic properties. Its output, however, is unstructured plain text with no programmatic interface, leaving data extraction entirely to the user and making systematic or high-throughput studies impractical. akaitools is a Python package that parses AkaiKKR output files into structured, type-annotated Python objects. The package covers three output types: self-consistent field (SCF) results, which capture convergence history and per-atom electronic and magnetic properties; spin-resolved, orbital projected density of states for each CPA component; and Bloch spectral functions on a user-defined k-point path. Results come back as immutable dataclasses backed by NumPy arrays. Energy quantities are available in both Rydbergs and electronvolts, and results can be exported to Pandas DataFrames. A built-in plotting module produces Matplotlib figures for DOS curves and SCF convergence. A command-line interface provides file summaries and JSON export without any Python scripting. The package also includes a programmatic input file generator, so full calculation pipelines from input preparation to output analysis can be run in Python.

AI.tldr: akaitools是一个Python包，能将AkaiKKR输出的非结构化文本解析为结构化、带类型注解的Python对象，支持SCF结果、态密度、Bloch谱函数等输出类型的程序化处理与可视化。
AI.motivation: AkaiKKR输出的纯文本格式缺乏程序化接口，数据提取完全依赖人工，使得系统性或高通量研究难以进行。
AI.method: 开发akaitools Python包，将AkaiKKR输出解析为不可变的dataclass（底层为NumPy数组），覆盖SCF结果、自旋分辨投影态密度、Bloch谱函数三类输出；提供命令行界面、Matplotlib绘图、Pandas导出及输入文件生成器功能。
AI.result: 实现了从输入文件生成、输出解析、数据导出到可视化的完整管线，能量单位支持Rydberg和eV，支持导出Pandas DataFrame。
AI.conclusion: akaitools填补了AkaiKKR缺乏程序化接口的空白，使得从输入准备到输出分析的完整计算流程可在Python中自动化执行，适用于高通量计算和系统研究。

title: Emergence of Resonating Valence-Bond Correlations in Stretched Graphene
summary: Electronic correlations in graphene are generally considered weak due to the large bandwidth of its $π$ electrons. Here we show that tensile expansion of the honeycomb lattice provides a direct route to enhancing correlation effects. Using variational and diffusion quantum Monte Carlo, we compare a conventional Jastrow-Slater determinant wave function with a resonating-valence-bond (RVB) Jastrow-antisymmetrized geminal product ansatz for a series of stretched graphene lattices. We find that the energy gain of the RVB state relative to the single-determinant description increases with bond expansion up to a critical strain $δ_{\mathrm{cr}}$, and decreases beyond it, revealing a nonmonotonic evolution of electronic correlations. The crossover is found to occur in the range $15\% < δ_{\mathrm{cr}} < 20\%$, in agreement with mechanical stability limits. This behavior indicates a transition from a weakly correlated Dirac semimetal to a regime with enhanced non-dynamic correlation and short-range singlet pairing. Our results provide direct many-body evidence that lattice expansion drives graphene into a regime where RVB-like correlations become energetically favorable, offering a simple route to tuning correlation effects in Dirac materials.

AI.tldr: 通过量子蒙特卡洛计算发现，拉伸石墨烯晶格（应变>15%）会增强电子关联效应，使共振价键态能量优于单Slater行列式描述，表明晶格膨胀可将石墨烯从弱关联狄拉克半金属驱动到具有增强非动态关联和短程单态配对的区域。
AI.motivation: 石墨烯的π电子带宽大，通常被认为关联效应弱。作者希望探索是否可以通过拉伸晶格来增强电子关联效应，从而在不引入复杂调控手段的情况下实现对狄拉克材料中关联效应的调控。
AI.method: 使用变分量子蒙特卡洛（VMC）和扩散量子蒙特卡洛（DMC）方法，比较了常规Jastrow-Slater行列式波函数与共振价键（RVB）Jastrow-反对称化双粒子乘积（AGP）波函数在一系列拉伸石墨烯晶格上的表现。
AI.result: RVB态相对于单Slater行列式的能量增益随键拉伸先增加后减小，呈非单调变化。临界应变δ_cr在15%-20%之间，与机械稳定性极限一致。表明存在从弱关联狄拉克半金属到增强非动态关联和短程单态配对区域的转变。
AI.conclusion: 晶格膨胀可以将石墨烯驱动到RVB关联变得能量有利的区域，为调控狄拉克材料中的关联效应提供了一条简单路径。

title: Streamlining Analysis and Design of Two-Dimensional Electronic Spectroscopy using Machine Learning
summary: Two-dimensional electronic spectroscopy (2DES) offers unique insights into the coupling between electronic and nuclear motion and dynamics, making it a key technique in diverse fields, including materials science and biology. Obtaining 2DES data requires a series of measurements that involve multiple pulses to construct the full picture - a time-consuming task that often necessitates working with limited or noisy data. Here we introduce a machine-learning based framework that aims to maximize the data that can be extracted from 2DES experiments and provides guidance towards the selection of additional experiments. We design a Gaussian mixture model to learn the underlying spectral density of a system, allowing the extraction of vibronic couplings and the extrapolation of the 2DES spectra to other time delays beyond those measured, and demonstrate how our framework can be used to select additional measurements to further improve the accuracy. We show that our approach yields accurate results on a variety of systems, including simulations ranging from photoactive yellow protein in the gas phase to Nile red in benzene to the anionic green fluorescent protein chromophore in water, and experiments on Nile blue in ethanol. Our work provides an efficient route to extract maximum insights from 2DES while incurring minimal experimental costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯混合模型的机器学习框架，用于从二维电子光谱（2DES）实验中最大化数据提取效率，能够推断振动耦合、外推光谱至未测量时间延迟，并指导后续实验选择，在多种模拟和实验体系中验证了其准确性。
AI.motivation: 2DES实验需要多脉冲多测量才能构建完整图像，耗时且常面临数据有限或噪声大的问题，因此需要一种能高效提取信息、指导实验设计的方法。
AI.method: 设计高斯混合模型学习系统的谱密度，从中提取振动耦合信息，外推2DES光谱至未测量时间延迟，并利用框架指导选择额外测量以提升精度。
AI.result: 在多种模拟体系（气相光活性黄色蛋白、苯中的尼罗红、水中的阴离子绿色荧光蛋白生色团）和实验体系（乙醇中的尼罗蓝）上均取得了准确结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一条高效从2DES中提取最大信息量的路径，同时将实验成本降至最低。

title: Classical dissipative search of unstructured database
summary: We propose a physical realization of the unstructured database search that works via classical, dissipative model of spherical spins. The database is implemented via spin-spin couplings, where the selected coupling refers to a larger ferromagnetic interaction between two selected spins. The low-temperature equilibrium of this model leads to magnetization strongly concentrated on the selected spins, which means that the search is complete. The search time refers to the relaxation time to equilibrium from a homogeneous initial state, and is described via Langevin equations. This time scales as ${\cal O}(M^a)$ with $a<1/2$, where $M$ is the database volume. This is faster than Grover's search, showing how a dissipative, classical analog computer can overcome the quantum unitary computer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于经典耗散球型自旋模型的非结构化数据库搜索物理实现方法，通过自旋-自旋耦合实现数据库，选择耦合对应两个选定自旋间的铁磁相互作用。低温平衡态下磁化强度集中到选定自旋上，搜索时间通过Langevin方程描述，缩放为O(M^a)且a<1/2，快于Grover量子搜索算法。
AI.motivation: 探索一种超越量子计算机（尤其是Grover搜索算法）的经典物理实现方案，证明经典的耗散模拟计算机在数据库搜索问题上可以击败量子幺正计算机。
AI.method: 采用经典耗散球型自旋模型，通过自旋-自旋耦合实现数据库编码，其中选中的两个自旋之间具有更强的铁磁相互作用。利用低温平衡态下磁化强度集中于选定自旋的特性实现搜索完成，搜索时间通过Langevin方程从均匀初始态到平衡态的弛豫过程描述。
AI.result: 搜索时间复杂度为O(M^a)，其中a<1/2，M为数据库体积。该缩放优于Grover算法的O(√M)，证明经典耗散模拟计算机在搜索问题上可超越量子计算机。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种比Grover量子搜索更快的经典物理搜索方案，表明在非结构化数据库搜索任务中，经典的耗散模拟计算范式可以超越量子幺正计算范式。

title: Time-resolved synchronization analysis of stacked intrinsic Josephson junctions of a cuprate superconductor with frequency-modulated terahertz radiation spectra
summary: Terahertz radiation from $\text{Bi}_2\text{Sr}_2\text{CaCu}_2\text{O}_{8+δ}$ intrinsic Josephson junctions (IJJs) provides an ideal platform to study the synchronization of a macroscopic quantum system. Here, we present a spectral analysis of a frequency-modulated Josephson plasma emitter coupled with patch antennas. In the unmodulated intensity distribution as a function of radiation frequency $I_{\mathrm{UM}}(ω)$, we observe a double Gaussian peak structure. Crucially, double-peak spectra obtained at a constant bias voltage imply either a rapid temporal distribution of resonances or their simultaneous excitation, driven by the mutual electromagnetic coupling between the IJJ mesa and the antennas. At low modulation frequencies $f_m$, the spectra are well reproduced by the products of $I_{\mathrm{UM}}(ω)$ and frequency combs, yielding a synchronized relaxation time $τ_s \simeq 0.28\text{ ns}$. Incorporating $τ_s$ quantitatively reproduces a drastic spectral transformation observed around $f_m \sim 1\text{ GHz}$, unveiling the sub-nanosecond non-equilibrium dynamics of coupled Josephson plasma.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊δ本征约瑟夫森结（IJJs）产生的太赫兹辐射，通过频谱分析发现未调制时呈现双高斯峰结构。在低频调制下，光谱可被未调制强度分布与频率梳的乘积完美重构，得到同步弛豫时间τ_s≈0.28 ns。该时间常数定量重现了约1 GHz频率附近剧烈的光谱转变，揭示了耦合约瑟夫森等离子体的亚纳秒非平衡动力学。
AI.motivation: 研究Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊δ本征约瑟夫森结（IJJs）中宏观量子系统的同步现象，特别是通过频谱分析理解频率调制的约瑟夫森等离子体发射器与贴片天线耦合的动力学机制。
AI.method: 对耦合贴片天线的频率调制约瑟夫森等离子体发射器进行频谱分析。观察未调制强度分布I_UM(ω)的双高斯峰结构；在低频调制下，将光谱表示为I_UM(ω)与频率梳的乘积，提取同步弛豫时间τ_s；利用τ_s定量重现高频调制下的光谱转变。
AI.result: 未调制光谱呈现双高斯峰结构；低频调制下光谱可被乘积模型完美重构，得到τ_s≈0.28 ns；该时间常数成功再现了约1 GHz附近的光谱剧烈转变。
AI.conclusion: 双峰结构暗示了共振的快速时间分布或同时激发；提取的亚纳秒弛豫时间揭示了耦合约瑟夫森等离子体的非平衡动力学本质，为理解宏观量子系统的同步行为提供了关键实验依据。

title: Deep Research in Physical Sciences: A Multi-Agent Framework and Comprehensive Benchmark
summary: Deep research agents are Large Language Model (LLM)-based systems designed for autonomous, multi-step scientific reasoning, and they hold immense potential for accelerating research in the physical sciences. However, comprehensive and in-depth evaluations of their capabilities within this domain remain lacking. To address this gap, we introduce PhySciBench, a benchmark highly relevant to physical science research, comprising 200 expert-curated questions, balanced between physics and chemistry, across six task categories that reflect real-world scientific workflows. Evaluations of state-of-the-art models and agent systems on PhySciBench reveal limited performance; even the strongest baseline, Gemini Deep Research, achieves an accuracy of only 33.5%. Analysis of failure cases identifies three recurrent deficiencies: fragility in extended reasoning chains, limited knowledge transfer across steps, and a lack of physics-grounded self-verification. Motivated by these findings, we develop DelveAgent, a modular multi-agent framework equipped with an adaptive planning loop, dual-granularity memory, and a hierarchical physics-grounded reflection mechanism. Across four scientific benchmarks, DelveAgent improves accuracy by up to 7.5 percentage points while reducing inference costs to approximately one-third of the strongest baseline. These results establish the significance of PhySciBench as a critical benchmark for evaluating AI systems in the physical sciences and demonstrate that architectural specialization can effectively enhance the reliability of autonomous scientific research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出物理科学基准PhySciBench（200题，物理/化学各半），评估发现最强模型Gemini Deep Research准确率仅33.5%。基于失败分析（推理链脆弱、知识迁移有限、缺乏物理验证），开发了DelveAgent多智能体框架（自适应规划、双粒度记忆、物理反思），在四个基准上提升准确率最高7.5%，推理成本降至约1/3。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏对LLM驱动的深度研究智能体在物理科学领域能力的全面深入评估。
AI.method: 构建PhySciBench（200道专家精选题，涵盖物理化学，6类任务）；提出DelveAgent（模块化多智能体框架，含自适应规划循环、双粒度记忆、层次化物理反思机制）。
AI.result: 最强基线Gemini Deep Research在PhySciBench上准确率仅33.5%；DelveAgent在四个科学基准上提升准确率最多7.5个百分点，推理成本降至约1/3。
AI.conclusion: PhySciBench是评估物理科学AI系统的重要基准，架构专用化能有效增强自主科学研究可靠性。

title: Negative diffusivity of excitons in electron-hole plasmas
summary: We develop a minimal hydrodynamic framework to describe exciton transport in the presence of an electron hole plasma in 2D semiconductors. Treating excitons, electrons, and holes as coupled fluids, we show that exciton diffusion is strongly renormalized by momentum exchange with the plasma. In the collisional regime, mutual diffusion leads to a nontrivial redistribution of transport coefficients but preserves the positivity of the exciton diffusivity. In contrast, when plasma inertia and collective charge oscillations are accounted for, the exciton diffusive mode hybridizes with acoustic plasma modes, giving rise to a dynamical instability manifested as an effective negative diffusion coefficient. We demonstrate that this instability originates from the nonequilibrium coupling between slow excitons and fast plasma degrees of freedom, rather than from nonlinear diffusion or thermodynamic effects. Our results provide a unified physical mechanism for negative exciton diffusivity reported in recent experiments and establish collective plasma dynamics as a key control parameter of exciton transport in 2D materials.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一个最小流体动力学框架，描述二维半导体中电子-空穴等离子体存在下的激子输运。研究发现，激子与等离子体的动量交换会强烈重整化激子扩散。在碰撞区，互扩散保持激子扩散系数为正；但当考虑等离子体惯性和集体电荷振荡时，激子扩散模式与声学等离子体模式混合，导致动态不稳定性，表现为有效负扩散系数。这为近期实验中观测到的负激子扩散率提供了统一的物理机制。
AI.motivation: 近期实验观察到二维半导体中激子扩散出现负扩散系数等反常现象，但缺乏统一的理论解释。本文旨在建立一个最小模型，揭示激子-等离子体耦合如何导致这些反常输运行为。
AI.method: 发展了流体动力学框架，将激子、电子和空穴作为耦合流体处理。通过分析两种情形：碰撞区（考虑互扩散）和包含等离子体惯性及集体电荷振荡的情形，研究激子扩散模式的演化。
AI.result: 1) 碰撞区：互扩散重整化输运系数，但保持激子扩散系数为正；2) 考虑等离子体惯性和集体振荡时：激子扩散模式与声学等离子体模式耦合，引发动态不稳定性，产生有效负扩散系数。该不稳定性源于慢激子与快等离子体自由度之间的非平衡耦合。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了集体等离子体动力学是二维材料中激子输运的关键控制参数，为实验中观测到的负激子扩散率提供了统一的物理机制。

title: Magnetotransport Measurements on Isolated Polycrystalline Grains of Type-II Silicon Clathrate
summary: The first low-temperature electronic transport characterization of individual polycrystalline grains of type-II silicon clathrate (Na$_x$Si$_{136}$, $x \ll 1$), isolated using microfabrication techniques, is reported. Structural characterization via Raman spectroscopy confirms that the isolated grains are largely devoid of amorphous silicon (a-Si). Temperature-dependent resistivity reveals multiple conduction regimes, including thermally activated freeze-out behavior and a transition to low-activation-energy transport at cryogenic temperatures, consistent with hopping conduction mechanisms. Hall measurements from 290 K to 3.5 K yield carrier concentration and mobility trends that correlate with the extracted activation energies, verifying $n$-type conduction. Additionally, gate-dependent conductivity measurements demonstrate electrostatic tunability at room temperature. Collectively, these results establish the magnetotransport parameters of single, isolated grains of type-II silicon clathrate and demonstrate the potential of this material for future quantum and optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了首个对单个II型硅包合物（NaₓSi₁₃₆，x≪1）多晶颗粒的低温电子输运表征，通过微加工技术分离出颗粒，并利用拉曼光谱确认其无定形硅含量极低。温度依赖性电阻率展示了多种导电机制，包括热激活冻结行为和低温下低激活能跃迁导电。霍尔测量验证了n型导电，栅极依赖性测量展示了室温静电可调性。这些结果确立了单颗粒硅包合物的磁输运参数，展示了其在量子与光电器件中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统硅材料在电子器件中性能受限，而II型硅包合物作为一种新型硅基材料，其电子输运特性尚未在单个颗粒尺度被系统研究。理解其微观导电机制对于开发下一代量子与光电器件至关重要。
AI.method: 采用微加工技术分离单个NaₓSi₁₃₆多晶颗粒，利用拉曼光谱进行结构表征；通过变温电阻率测量（从高温到低温）分析导电机制；结合霍尔效应测量提取载流子浓度和迁移率；进行栅极依赖性电导测量以评估静电调控能力。
AI.result: 拉曼光谱证实颗粒中无定形硅含量极少；电阻率随温度变化显示多个导电区域：高温热激活冻结行为，低温低激活能跃迁导电；霍尔测量从290 K到3.5 K确认n型导电，载流子浓度和迁移率趋势与激活能一致；栅极依赖性测量表明室温下可静电调控电导。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次建立了单个II型硅包合物颗粒的磁输运参数，验证了其多机制导电行为（热激活与跃迁导电），证实了n型导电特性及静电可调性，为该材料在量子与光电器件中的应用提供了实验基础。

title: Mapping the non-equilibrium interacting Anderson Impurity Model to an effective Gaussian theory
summary: Quantum impurity models with strong electron correlations, such as the paradigmatic Anderson Impurity Model (AIM), are central to our understanding of a range of physical phenomena including local moment formation, Coulomb blockade and Kondo screening. They describe magnetic atoms and molecules on surfaces, quantum dot circuits, and correlated materials through dynamical mean field theory. The physics of such systems in strongly non-equilibrium conditions is particularly complex and challenging to capture, whereas Gaussian models of free fermions can be easily solved. Here we show that the time-evolving dynamics of the AIM after a quench can be described by a completely non-interacting version of the model, at the expense of coupling to additional static auxiliary degrees of freedom. Starting from the full solution of the quenched AIM using ED and DMRG, we study the properties of this mapping using numerical optimization, and uncover intriguing structure in the auxiliary system. The method allows us to understand interacting non-equilibrium dynamics through the simpler lens of an effective non-interacting system of larger dimension.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，安德森杂质模型（AIM）在淬火后的时间演化动力学，可以通过一个完全无相互作用的版本（耦合额外静态辅助自由度）来描述，从而用更大维度的有效无相互作用系统简化了强关联非平衡动力学的理解。
AI.motivation: 强关联量子杂质模型（如AIM）在非平衡条件下的动力学极其复杂且难以求解，而高斯无相互作用费米子模型则易于处理。作者希望找到一种映射，将复杂的有相互作用非平衡问题转化为更简单的无相互作用问题。
AI.method: 从淬火AIM的精确对角化（ED）和密度矩阵重整化群（DMRG）完全解出发，通过数值优化研究该映射的性质，将时间演化动力学映射到耦合额外静态辅助自由度的完全无相互作用版本。
AI.result: 发现淬火后AIM的动力学可以被一个更大维度的有效无相互作用系统所描述，并且辅助系统中存在有趣的结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过更大维度的有效无相互作用系统，为理解相互作用非平衡动力学提供了更简单的视角。

title: Giant Nonequilibrium Fluctuations at a Reactive Surface
summary: We investigate whether giant fluctuations in a gas can induce corresponding fluctuations on a reactive surface in contact with the gas. Numerical simulations of a minimal heterogeneous catalytic reactor demonstrate that such fluctuations indeed emerge on the surface, with spatial correlations extending over micrometer scales. These fluctuations originate from the dependence of the adsorption rate on the reactant partial pressure. As a result, the surface-coverage structure factor mirrors that of the partial pressure, exhibiting similar enhancement and roll-off behavior across wave numbers.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值模拟研究气体中的巨涨落如何影响与其接触的反应表面，发现表面确实会出现微米尺度的空间相关涨落，源于吸附速率对反应物分压的依赖。
AI.motivation: 探究气体中的巨涨落是否能够诱发接触反应表面上的相应涨落，理解气体-表面耦合动力学。
AI.method: 对最小异质催化反应器进行数值模拟，分析表面覆盖结构因子与分压的关系。
AI.result: 表面确实出现气体诱导的涨落，空间相关尺度达微米级；表面覆盖结构因子与分压结构因子相似，呈现增强和滚降行为。
AI.conclusion: 气体中巨涨落可通过吸附速率依赖机制传递给反应表面，两者结构因子具有一致性。

title: Thermodynamics of photonic nonlinear Aharonov-Bohm cages
summary: We investigate equilibrium and non-equilibrium thermodynamics of one-dimensional photonic diamond lattices with Kerr nonlinearity. The equilibrium phase diagram is obtained as a function of the synthetic magnetic flux acting on each plaquette. In the linear regime, the magnetic flux can induce Aharonov-Bohm caging, flattening all Bloch bands and suppressing particle and energy currents. In this caging regime, non-vanishing currents are enabled by nonlinearity. By imposing stationary temperature- and chemical potential- imbalances at the system boundaries, we show that at weak nonlinearity fine tuning the flux at the Aharonov-Bohm caging transforms the system from a conductor to an insulator. For intermediate nonlinear strength, the system remains conducting for all magnetic fluxes; however, the caging condition significantly enhances the Seebeck coefficient and thermoelectric figure of merit, improving the thermoelectric features of the system. Our results give evidence of a novel route towards optimization of coupled transport devices, based on the control of linear versus nonlinear conduction channels via a synthetic magnetic flux.

AI.tldr: 研究了一维光子钻石晶格在Kerr非线性下的平衡与非平衡热力学，发现合成磁通量可诱导Aharonov-Bohm笼效应，非线性效应可调控系统的导电-绝缘转变，并在笼条件下显著提升热电性能。
AI.motivation: 探索利用合成磁通量调控非线性光子晶格的热电输运特性，寻找优化热电耦合器件的新途径。
AI.method: 通过理论分析平衡相图，结合非线性Kerr效应，在系统边界施加温度与化学势差，研究不同磁通量和非线性强度下的输运性质。
AI.result: 弱非线性下，精细调节磁通量至Aharonov-Bohm笼条件可实现导体-绝缘体转变；中等非线性下系统保持导电性，但笼条件显著增强Seebeck系数和热电优值。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通过合成磁通量控制线性与非线性导电通道来优化热电耦合器件性能的新策略。

title: Counterintuitive inverse superconducting transition beyond 4He-cooling limit
summary: Thermally driven quantum-orders observed in exceptional instances may redefine the role of thermal-fluctuation from a source of decoherence to a resource for coherent-state engineering. While preliminary signs of counterintuitive temperature-rise-triggered superconductivity manifested in CeCu2Si2, ErRh4B4, Ho1.2Mo6S8 and (La,Ce)Al2, their critical-temperatures (Tc-inv) remain below Kelvin-range, precluding substantial applications. Here, we report field-modulated inverse-superconducting-transitions above 4He-cooling-limit in Eu-based infinite-layer nickelates (EuxNd1-xNiO2 and EuxPr1-xNiO2) grown on a substrate under both overdoped and underdoped regimes. Paradigmatically, superconductivity with zero-resistance is confined between Tc-inv (2.6-5.4 K) and another higher normal-Tc, rising and decreasing with applied magnetic-field, respectively. Starting from the resistive-state below Tc-inv, the inverse-superconducting-transition is driven by not only temperature-rising, but also current-density, while superconductivity further vanishes at higher temperature and current thresholds. The Kelvin-range inverse superconducting transition is plausibly explained by temperature-induced alternating dominance of effective magnetic-fields arising from Eu2+4f7 related compensations relative to the upper-critical-field. Furthermore, an extended-phenomenological-framework is also supported by reemerged superconductivity below 300 mK under magnetic-field, giving rise to an unprecedented temperature-induced reentrant superconductivity. Our findings establish magnetic-interaction-reconfigured high-Tc systems as fertile platforms for exploring quantum phenomena that reverse thermal-decoherence paradigm, also enabling antithetical-designs to unlock untapped application-scenarios for quantum-phase-transition devices.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了Eu基无限层镍酸盐（EuxNd1-xNiO2和EuxPr1-xNiO2）中在4He冷却极限以上（2.6-5.4 K）发生的场调制逆超导转变。零电阻超导态被限制在逆转变温度（Tc-inv）和另一个更高的正常Tc之间，分别随磁场升高和降低。逆超导转变不仅可由升温驱动，也可由电流密度驱动。低于300 mK在磁场下还出现再入超导。该现象基于Eu²⁺4f⁷相关补偿效应导致的温度诱导有效磁场与上临界场的交替主导机制。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统认为热涨落是退相干来源的观点，探索热驱动量子有序现象。此前逆超导仅在CeCu2Si2等材料中低于Kelvin温区出现，无法实际应用，因此需要寻找更高温区的逆超导体系。
AI.method: 在Eu基无限层镍酸盐薄膜（EuxNd1-xNiO2和EuxPr1-xNiO2）上，通过衬底生长实现过掺杂和欠掺杂两种载流子浓度，施加外磁场调制，测量电阻-温度-磁场-电流密度的依赖关系。
AI.result: 实现了4He冷却极限以上（2.6-5.4 K）的逆超导转变：零电阻超导态存在于Tc-inv和更高正常Tc之间；Tc-inv随磁场升高而升高，正常Tc随磁场升高而降低；逆超导转变可由升温和增大电流密度两种方式驱动；在300 mK以下磁场下观察到再入超导。
AI.conclusion: 发现了磁场可调的、Kelvin温区逆超导转变，建立了磁相互作用重构的高温超导体系作为探索反转热退相干范式的量子现象平台，并为量子相变器件提供了反直觉设计方案。

title: Extension of a multi-region free-surface MHD solver beyond the inductionless approximation
summary: Free-surface liquid metal flows are a leading candidate for the plasma-facing components of future fusion reactors. Existing transient, three-dimensional, free-surface MHD solvers rely on the inductionless approximation in which the induced magnetic field is neglected. This paper extends the open-source solver FreeMHD [B. Wynne et al., Phys. Plasmas 32, 013907 (2025)] beyond the inductionless approximation to resolve the induced magnetic field self-consistently using a vector-potential formulation that enforces $\nabla\cdot\boldsymbol{B}=0$ by construction while preserving the original multi-region, two-phase framework. The solver is verified against analytical Shercliff and Hunt duct-flow solutions across a range of Hartmann numbers and validated against free-surface height measurements from the LMX-U experiment. To the best of our knowledge, FreeMHD2 is the first open-source, experimentally validated free-surface liquid metal solver to resolve the evolution of the induced magnetic field without invoking the inductionless approximation. By removing this approximation rather than relaxing it, the formulation provides the basis for future modeling of the finite magnetic Reynolds number conditions expected in large-scale, transient fusion events.

AI.tldr: 本文在开源求解器FreeMHD基础上，扩展了无需感应近似、自洽求解感应磁场的自由表面液态金属MHD求解器FreeMHD2，并通过解析解和实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有自由表面液态金属MHD求解器依赖感应近似（忽略感应磁场），无法适用于未来聚变反应堆中有限磁雷诺数的大尺度瞬态事件，亟需开发无需该近似的求解器。
AI.method: 采用矢量势公式，从构造上保证$\nabla\cdot\boldsymbol{B}=0$；在原有FreeMHD的多区域、两相框架下，自洽求解感应磁场演化，突破感应近似限制。
AI.result: 在多个Hartmann数范围内通过Shercliff和Hunt解析解验证，并利用LMX-U实验的自由表面高度测量数据进行了实验验证。
AI.conclusion: FreeMHD2是首个开源且经实验验证的、无需感应近似的自由表面液态金属MHD求解器，为未来聚变堆大尺度瞬态事件的有限磁雷诺数建模提供了基础。

title: Persistent current and orbital magnetization along a valley-contrasting junction in bilayer graphene in a magnetic field
summary: In a magnetic field bilayer graphene hosts an octet of pseudo-zero-mode electron levels nearly degenerate in orbitals $n=(0,1)$, valleys and spins. They split in valleys by electrostatic gating. In gated bilayer graphene, in which the interlayer bias is set up to flip sign across a line, one has a line junction that traps a portion of pseudo-zero-mode electrons inside the insulating bulk band gap, giving rise to electron states localized along the junction, known as kink states. A close look is made into the spectra and electromagnetic response of such kink states. There are two species of valley current associated with them, a drift current driven by the bias gradient and a circulating current coming from cyclotron motion. It turns out that they both flow in essentially the same direction, with the circulating current exhibiting a magnetic character distinct from those of other higher levels. In equilibrium they spatially circulate within the kink states, creating a quasi-one-dimensional channel of orbital magnetization. The electric control of the orbital magnetization and valley currents via a network of gated junctions will find useful applications in valley electronics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双层石墨烯中由栅极电压线结产生的kink态，分析了其能谱和电磁响应，发现存在两种谷电流（漂移电流和回旋电流），并揭示了kink态中平衡态轨道磁化的准一维通道，为谷电子学应用提供了可能。
AI.motivation: 探索双层石墨烯中栅极电压线结束缚的kink态的电子性质及其电磁响应，理解其谷电流行为，为谷电子学器件提供理论基础。
AI.method: 理论分析双层石墨烯在磁场中八重简并的准零模能级，通过静电栅极产生谷分裂，设置跨线翻转的层间偏压形成线结，进而研究束缚态（kink态）的能谱和电磁响应。
AI.result: kink态存在两种谷电流：偏压梯度驱动的漂移电流和回旋运动产生的循环电流，两者方向基本一致；循环电流展现出与更高能级不同的磁性特征；平衡态下电流在kink态内空间循环，形成准一维轨道磁化通道。
AI.conclusion: 通过栅极结网络可实现对轨道磁化和谷电流的电控，在谷电子学中有重要应用前景。

title: Hydration-controlled twist forms a moiré glass in charge-frustrated layered silicates
comment: 25 pages, 4 main figures, 8 supplementary figures, 1 supplementary table
summary: Twisting layered materials produces moiré superlattices, but prescribed twist angles are usually obtained by demanding assembly procedures. Here we show that montmorillonite, an abundant swelling clay, forms tunable moiré superlattices naturally. Focal-series high-resolution transmission electron microscopy, geometric phase analysis, and molecular dynamics simulation reveal that its apparent rotational disorder is biased toward low-angle misorientations inherited from discrete hydration states. Multilayer stacks preferentially adopt twists near 1-2°, 4°, and 10°, producing long-wavelength moirés without long-range rotational order. We define this kinetically trapped state as a moiré glass, distinct from featureless turbostratic stacking. Simulations indicate that lattice-charge disorder stabilizes the angular preferences, whereas charge ordering promotes random stacking. Hydration screens interlayer interactions and lubricates twist, while dehydration arrests the resulting configurations in discrete steps. These results establish dynamic hydration as a macroscopic handle for programming twist in layered matter.

AI.tldr: 蒙脱石（一种天然黏土）通过水合作用自发形成可调的莫尔超晶格，产生偏向低角度扭曲（1-2°、4°、10°）的"莫尔玻璃"态，不同于传统的无序堆叠。
AI.motivation: 传统方法制备扭转莫尔超晶格需要精密组装，过程繁琐。寻找自然界中天然形成的可调莫尔超晶格，探索更简便的调控途径。
AI.method: 使用聚焦序列高分辨率透射电子显微镜、几何相位分析和分子动力学模拟，研究蒙脱石的扭转结构及水合作用的影响。
AI.result: 发现蒙脱石的旋转无序偏向低角度取向（1-2°、4°、10°），形成长波长莫尔图案但无长程旋转有序；晶格电荷无序稳定了角度偏好，而电荷有序促进随机堆叠；水合作用屏蔽层间相互作用并润滑扭转。
AI.conclusion: 证明了动态水合可作为编程层状材料扭转角度的宏观调控手段，为无需精密组装的莫尔超晶格制备提供了新途径。

title: Nonequilibrium nucleation theory for nonconserved fields: from active matter to population dynamics
summary: Classical nucleation theory (CNT) describes the formation of a stable phase from a metastable one. In equilibrium systems, it quantifies the free-energy competition between a favorable bulk gain and an unfavorable interfacial cost. For systems without detailed balance, the corresponding nonequilibrium nucleation theory (NNT) was so far developed only for cases with a conserved order parameter, such as active fluid-fluid phase separation. Here we construct the NNT for systems with a (single, scalar) nonconserved order parameter. Unlike in the conserved case, the nucleation barrier controlling (noise-driven) droplet growth is profoundly altered by deviations in the interfacial density profile from the one arising during (deterministic) droplet relaxation. The barrier can nonetheless be analysed by carefully defining the reaction coordinate (droplet radius) to project out those deviations. We give explicit NNT predictions for models drawn from population dynamics and active matter, finding excellent agreement with numerical studies.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了针对非保守序参量的非平衡成核理论（NNT），发现界面密度分布的偏差会显著改变成核势垒，并通过合理定义反应坐标（液滴半径）成功预测了种群动力学和活性物质模型中的成核行为。
AI.motivation: 经典成核理论（CNT）仅适用于平衡系统，而现有的非平衡成核理论（NNT）只考虑了守恒序参量的情况（如活性流体相分离）。对于非保守序参量的系统（如活性物质、种群动力学），尚缺乏相应的成核理论框架。
AI.method: 通过仔细定义反应坐标（液滴半径）来投影出界面密度分布偏差的影响，从而构建非保守序参量系统的NNT框架。
AI.result: 发现非保守情况下，成核势垒被液滴弛豫过程中的界面密度分布偏差显著改变，这与守恒情况有本质不同。在种群动力学和活性物质模型中的数值验证结果与理论预测高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 成功构建了适用于非保守序参量系统的非平衡成核理论，揭示了界面密度分布偏差对成核势垒的关键影响，并通过数值模拟验证了理论的准确性。

title: The electric-field-driven intermediate state of three-dimensional superconductors
summary: The coexistence of superconductivity and finite electric fields may enable access to intriguing forms of electronic states. We demonstrate the emergence of an intermediate state in which electric fields penetrate the system while superconductivity still persists. Our measurements reveal a nonclassical regime characterized by the simultaneous presence of supercurrent and dissipative charge transport. This state, realized in a pristine unpatterned three-dimensional system, arises from electric-field-driven order parameter fluctuations. It provides a platform to explore dissipative states of charged quantum fluids far from equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了一种在超导体系中电场穿透且超导性仍存的中间态，该态表现为超电流与耗散电荷输运共存，源于电场驱动的序参量涨落，为非平衡态带电量子流体的耗散态研究提供了平台。
AI.motivation: 探索超导电性与有限电场共存的可能性，以揭示新奇的电子态。
AI.method: 在无图案化的三维纯净系统中进行测量，通过施加电场驱动序参量涨落，观察超电流与耗散输运的共存现象。
AI.result: 发现了非经典区域，其中电场穿透系统而超导性仍然保持，超电流与耗散电荷输运同时存在。
AI.conclusion: 这种电场驱动的中间态为研究远离平衡态的带电量子流体的耗散态提供了平台。

title: Discovering a well-conditioned analytic continuation problem via dictionary learning
comment: 25 pages, 8 figures, 3 algorithms, to be submitted to Computer Physics Communications
summary: Many fields of physics use quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) simulations to simulate quantum systems in imaginary-time $τ$ and estimate imaginary-time correlation functions (ITCF). However, extracting dynamic $ω$-dependent quantities from ITCFs is a notoriously difficult task, known as analytic continuation (AC), that amounts to solving an exponentially ill-conditioned inverse problem. Within the AC literature, there are competing stochastic and regularized approaches, as well as an emerging collection of works using parameterized models like neural networks. Here we transcend the traditional divides between the communities, introducing the regularized stochastic optimization method (RSOM). This method reformulates AC as a dictionary learning problem, discovering a sparse dictionary to represent the solution. Our approach is motivated by the astounding results dictionary learning has produced in many scientific fields. Remarkably, RSOM discovers a sparse dictionary that maps an ill-conditioned inverse problem to a low-dimensional problem that is well-conditioned. We demonstrate that the method yields competitive results for common synthetic test problems as well as for authentic QMC data from the finite temperature electron gas. This work exposes that a dictionary exists within all stochastic and regularized methods and that dictionary learning provides a new angle of attack for future AC methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种正则化随机优化方法（RSOM），将解析延拓问题重新表述为字典学习问题，通过发现稀疏字典将病态逆问题转化为良态低维问题，在合成测试和真实QMC数据上均取得了有竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 量子蒙特卡洛模拟中提取动力学信息的解析延拓是一个病态逆问题，现有随机方法、正则化方法和神经网络方法各有局限且社区之间存在隔阂，亟需统一且有效的新方法。
AI.method: 将解析延拓重新表述为字典学习问题，通过正则化随机优化方法（RSOM）学习一个稀疏字典，将病态的高维逆问题映射到条件良好的低维子空间中进行求解。
AI.result: 在合成测试问题以及有限温度电子气的真实QMC数据上均取得了有竞争力的结果，展示了字典学习方法在解析延拓中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了现有所有随机和正则化方法中都隐含着一个字典，字典学习为未来解析延拓方法提供了新的攻击角度和统一框架。

title: Magnon-dislon hybridization in magnetic insulators
summary: Spin dynamics in ordered magnets with topological lattice defects is investigated. Using fracton--elasticity duality, we develop an effective field theory of magnons coupled to quantized lattice dislocations (dislons) in magnetic insulators. Within this framework, an elastic gauge field mediates a nonlocal interaction between dislocations and magnetization gradients. The resulting magnetoelastic coupling gives rise to coherent magnon-dislon hybridization whose properties are dictated by dislocation topology. Screw dislocations exhibit helicity-selective hybridization and symmetry-protected dark dislon sectors, while edge dislocations generate anisotropic hybrid excitations with finite spin-precession ellipticity through the glide constraint. Our results establish dislocations as dynamical topological defects with directly observable polarization fingerprints in magnon spectra, and reveal magnon-dislon hybridization as a new route to control spin dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用分形子-弹性对偶性，发展了磁绝缘体中自旋波（磁振子）与量子化晶格位错（dislon）耦合的有效场理论，揭示了位错拓扑性质驱动的磁振子-位错杂化及其对自旋动力学的调控。
AI.motivation: 研究有序磁体中拓扑晶格缺陷（位错）对自旋动力学（磁振子）的影响，探索位错作为动力学拓扑缺陷的物理效应。
AI.method: 采用分形子-弹性对偶性（fracton--elasticity duality），构建磁振子与量子化位错耦合的有效场理论；弹性规范场介导位错与磁化梯度之间的非局域相互作用。
AI.result: 螺位错产生手性选择性杂化和对称性保护的暗dislon sector；刃位错通过滑移约束产生各向异性杂化激发，具有有限的自旋进动椭圆度。
AI.conclusion: 位错是可在磁振子谱中直接观测极化指纹的动力学拓扑缺陷，磁振子-dislon杂化为控制自旋动力学提供了新途径。

title: Chemical Vapor Deposition of Ni-doped Iron Germanium Telluride Nanosheets
summary: Iron germanium telluride (FGT; FemGenTe2) compounds have attracted significant interest due to their layered van der Waals structure, relatively high Curie temperature, and tunable magnetic properties. Chemical vapor deposition (CVD) is a particularly promising synthesis route owing to its simplicity, low cost, potential for scalability, and widespread adoption in the semiconductor industry, yet it has not been used previously to synthesize FGT with dopants. Here, we report CVD synthesis of both undoped and Ni-doped FGT nanosheets on SiO2/Si substrates. By adjusting precursor molar ratios, we synthesized Ni-doped FGT with multiple Fe concentrations and a 4% Ni-to-Fe ratio. X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy depth profiling further demonstrates that Ni is present in the bulk of the crystals. This straightforward, low-cost, and CMOS-compatible approach demonstrates a route to Ni-doped FGT nanosheets, establishing a foundation for future characterization of Ni-doped FGT and its potential integration into spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过化学气相沉积法成功合成了未掺杂和 Ni 掺杂的 Fe₃GeTe₂纳米片，并通过 XPS 证实 Ni 存在于晶体内部，为自旋电子器件应用奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: Fe₃GeTe₂化合物因其层状结构和高居里温度受到关注，但此前尚未有研究使用化学气相沉积法合成掺杂型 FGT，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用化学气相沉积法，在 SiO₂/Si 衬底上通过调整前驱体摩尔比，合成未掺杂和 Ni 掺杂的 FGT 纳米片，并使用 X 射线光电子能谱深度剖析验证 Ni 的体相分布。
AI.result: 成功合成了不同 Fe 浓度和 4% Ni/Fe 比例的 Ni 掺杂 FGT 纳米片；XPS 深度剖析证实 Ni 均匀存在于晶体体相中。
AI.conclusion: 该化学气相沉积方法简单、低成本且与 CMOS 工艺兼容，为 Ni 掺杂 FGT 纳米片的制备及未来自旋电子器件集成提供了可行的技术路线。

title: Trion Hall effect in electron-hole double layers
summary: The realization of Coulomb coupled electron-hole double layers in 2D semiconductor heterostructures has enabled the thermodynamic and transport studies of equilibrium exciton fluids without a magnetic field. By doping the exciton fluid with additional electrons/holes, an equilibrium fluid of trions - three particle bound states of electrons and holes - further emerge, providing the platform to explore new transport phenomena associated with such composite particles. Here we report the observation of a Hall effect for trions in MoSe2/WSe2 heterobilayers, which support Coulomb-coupled electron and hole fluids with tunable densities. The Hall effect arises from a Lorentz force on trions under a perpendicular magnetic field. It is manifested in both Hall drag measurements and standard Hall effect measurements on just one of the semiconductor layers. For negatively charged trions, an electron Hall effect is observed even in a hole doped WSe2 monolayer due to the presence of trion drags. The trion Hall effect also disappears when the trions are ionized at elevated temperatures and/or high trion densities. Our work opens the door for realizing quantum oscillations and the quantum Hall effect for trions.

AI.tldr: 本文在MoSe2/WSe2异质双层中观测到了三子（trion）的霍尔效应，该效应源于垂直磁场对三子的洛伦兹力，并通过霍尔拖曳测量和标准霍尔效应测量得以验证。研究还发现，负电荷三子在空穴掺杂的WSe2单层中表现出电子霍尔效应，而高温或高三子密度下三子电离会导致霍尔效应消失。
AI.motivation: 在二维半导体异质结构中实现库仑耦合的电子-空穴双层，使得无磁场下平衡激子流体的热力学和输运研究成为可能；通过掺杂额外电子/空穴可进一步形成三子（trions）平衡流体，为探索这类复合粒子的新输运现象提供平台。
AI.method: 在MoSe2/WSe2异质双层中构建库仑耦合的电子-空穴双层，通过调节载流子密度，在垂直磁场下测量三子的霍尔拖曳效应和标准霍尔效应。
AI.result: 观测到三子的霍尔效应，在空穴掺杂的WSe2单层中负电荷三子表现出电子霍尔效应；高温或高三子密度下三子电离导致霍尔效应消失。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为三子实现量子振荡和量子霍尔效应打开了大门。

title: Large-deviation tails of critical order-parameter distributions
summary: Large-deviation tails of critical probability distributions provide a sensitive probe of universality beyond standard finite-size scaling. We study these tails for critical percolation and Fortuin--Kasteleyn Ising models on two-dimensional lattices, three-dimensional lattices, and complete graphs. We consider two rescaled order parameters: the magnetization-like variable $x_m=|M|/\langle |M|\rangle$, including a signed cluster-mass analogue for percolation, and the largest-cluster variable $x_C=C_1/\langle C_1\rangle$. For $x_m$, we test the expected stretched-exponential large-deviation tail and show that the same form applies to the percolation analogue. For $x_C$, guided by the exact complete-graph result and scaling arguments, we propose universal scaling forms for both tails of the cumulative distribution and test them by extensive Monte Carlo simulations. In the complete-graph FK-Ising model, the left tail is governed by rare configurations with percolation-like scaling rather than by the typical Ising scaling. Our results show that the tails of order-parameter distributions reveal universal features of critical fluctuations that are not captured by averaged observables alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究临界概率分布的大偏差尾部，通过渗流和FK-Ising模型在二维、三维格子及完全图上的分析，发现序参数分布的尾部揭示了平均观测值无法捕捉的临界涨落普适特征。
AI.motivation: 临界概率分布的大偏差尾部提供了超越标准有限尺寸标度的普适性敏感探针，而平均观测值无法捕捉这些特征。
AI.method: 研究两种重整化序参数：磁化类变量x_m和最大簇变量x_C。通过解析完全图结果和标度论证提出普适标度形式，并用蒙特卡洛模拟进行验证。
AI.result: x_m的拉伸指数大偏差尾部适用于渗流模拟；x_C的左尾由渗流类标度的稀有构型主导，而非典型Ising标度。完全图FK-Ising模型揭示此现象。
AI.conclusion: 序参数分布尾部揭示了平均观测值无法捕捉的临界涨落普适特征，大偏差尾部是研究临界现象的有效工具。

title: Room-Temperature Calcium Intercalation into Graphite Catalyzed by Sodium
summary: Calcium (Ca) insertion into graphite (C) has been considered to require elevated temperatures, and its occurrence at room temperature (RT) has been regarded as highly unlikely. Here, we demonstrate that sodium (Na) catalysis enables the formation of superconducting CaC$_6$ even at RT. In mixtures of Ca, Na, and graphite, the gradual development of superconducting diamagnetism and the emergence of X-ray diffraction peaks confirm the formation of CaC$_6$ during storage at RT. The superconducting transition temperature increases with storage time, and the amount of CaC$_6$ scales proportionally to the square root of storage time. These findings provide new insights into the mechanism of superconductivity and Na-catalyzed formation of CaC$_6$, and highlight the potential of this RT intercalation process for practical applications such as electrode materials in Ca-ion batteries.

AI.tldr: 本文发现钠催化作用下，钙能在室温下插入石墨形成超导CaC₆，颠覆了传统认为需要高温的认知。
AI.motivation: 传统认为钙插入石墨需要高温，室温下几乎不可能发生。作者试图探索室温下形成CaC₆的可能性及其催化机制。
AI.method: 将Ca、Na与石墨混合，在室温下储存，通过超导抗磁性的逐步发展和X射线衍射峰的出现来确认CaC₆的形成。
AI.result: 室温下成功形成CaC₆；超导转变温度随储存时间增加；CaC₆生成量与储存时间的平方根成正比。
AI.conclusion: Na催化可实现在室温下形成超导CaC₆，该室温插层过程对钙离子电池电极材料等实际应用具有潜力。

title: Acceleration of an algebraic multigrid pressure solver using graph neural networks
summary: Solving the pressure-Poisson equation remains the primary computational bottleneck in incompressible unstructured flow solvers primarily due to the inherent sensitivity of traditional linear solvers to mesh irregularities. This work introduces a data-driven algebraic multigrid (AMG) smoother that uses a modified graph convolutional isomorphism network (GCIN). The graph neural network predicts optimal polynomial coefficients to construct a sparse pseudo-inverse operator across diverse grid topologies. The coefficients are optimized to reduce the residual after each V-cycle iteration. By directly capturing the algebraic structure of the system from the sparse coefficient matrix, the proposed method maintains the solver's linearity while adapting to local anisotropies in unstructured grids. Our framework demonstrates significant performance gains by reducing the number of V-cycles required for a given tolerance and delivering wall-clock speedups from 4% to 37% across diverse benchmarks. Notably, the model exhibits robust generalization by maintaining efficiency on meshes up to 128 times larger than those seen in training, and by accelerating the solver's convergence on unseen industry-relevant problems such as the AirfRANS dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的代数多重网格（AMG）平滑器，使用改进的图卷积同构网络（GCIN）预测最优多项式系数，构建稀疏伪逆算子，在非结构化网格求解压力泊松方程时减少V-cycle迭代次数，实现4%-37%的加速，并能在训练未见过的网格（大128倍）和工业数据集上保持泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统线性求解器对网格不规则性敏感，求解压力泊松方程是非结构化不可压流求解器的主要计算瓶颈，亟需更高效且适应非结构化网格的求解方法。
AI.method: 采用改进的图卷积同构网络（GCIN）作为数据驱动AMG平滑器，从稀疏系数矩阵中直接捕获代数结构，预测最优多项式系数以构建稀疏伪逆算子，在保持求解器线性特性的同时适应局部各向异性。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试中，V-cycle迭代次数减少，壁钟时间加速4%-37%；模型在比训练集大128倍的网格上仍保持效率，并在AirfRANS等工业问题上验证了收敛加速能力。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的AMG平滑器能有效解决非结构化网格中的压力泊松方程求解瓶颈，兼具高性能与强泛化能力，适用于实际工程问题。

title: Strain induced magnetic phase transition and anomalous transport phenomena in RuO$_2$ and MnF$_2$
summary: Collinear antiferromagnets with broken time-reversal symmetry have emerged as a fertile platform for spintronics. Using a general tight-binding model and first-principles calculations, we show that strain engineering provides a simple route to control magnetic phase transition and activate transverse responses in representative altermagnets RuO$_2$ and MnF$_2$. For pristine RuO$_2$ and MnF$_2$ with Néel vector $\mathbf{n}\parallel$ [001], symmetry constrains the off-diagonal elements of the Hall conductivity tensor to vanish, thereby forbidding anomalous transport and magneto-optical responses. Shear strain applied along the $ac$ direction preserves the spin symmetry relating the two spin-opposite magnetic sublattices and therefore maintains the altermagnetic phase. By contrast, shear strain applied along the $ab$ direction breaks this spin symmetry and drives a transition from an altermagnetic phase to a partially compensated ferrimagnetic phase in metallic RuO$_2$ and to a fully compensated ferrimagnetic phase in semiconducting MnF$_2$. In addition, the lowered symmetry enables finite anomalous Hall, anomalous Nernst, and anomalous thermal Hall conductivities, as well as magneto-optical rotation angles, which are prohibited in the pristine systems. These responses exhibit a clear strain dependence and become progressively stronger as the strain amplitude increases. Our results establish strain engineering as an effective route to manipulate magnetic phases and functional responses in unconventional antiferromagnets, thereby expanding opportunities for antiferromagnetic spintronics and magneto-optical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究显示，通过应变工程可以控制共线反铁磁体（如RuO₂和MnF₂）的磁相变，并激活原本被禁止的横向输运和磁光响应，为反铁磁自旋电子学提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 探索利用应变工程这一简单方法，调控具有破缺时间反演对称性的共线反铁磁体（交变磁体）的磁相变和功能响应，以克服其本征对称性对横向输运和磁光响应的限制。
AI.method: 基于紧束缚模型和第一性原理计算，以RuO₂和MnF₂为代表性交变磁体，研究不同方向剪切应变对磁相和输运性质的影响。
AI.result: (1) ac方向剪切应变保持自旋对称性，维持交变磁相；(2) ab方向剪切应变破坏自旋对称性，诱导RuO₂从交变磁相转变为部分补偿亚铁磁相，MnF₂转变为完全补偿亚铁磁相；(3) 对称性降低后，原本禁止的反常霍尔、反常能斯特、反常热霍尔电导率及磁光旋转角被激活，且随应变增强而增大。
AI.conclusion: 应变工程是操控非常规反铁磁体磁相和功能响应的有效途径，为反铁磁自旋电子学和磁光应用拓展了新机遇。

title: Evidence for Multiband Superconductivity in 2H-NbSeS
summary: The nature of superconductivity in 2H-NbSe2 has generated sustained debate in the recent past. While angle resolved photoemission spectroscopy data have been interpreted as evidence for multiband superconductivity, the data from scanning tunneling microscope experiments relate to strongly anisotropic single-band superconductivity. In the later case, the charge density wave (CDW) order mimics the multigap character. Because the CDW reconstructs the Fermi surface and modifies the superconducting gap distribution, disentangling intrinsic multiband pairing from CDW-related effects is challenging. To address this issue, we investigate single-crystalline 2H-NbSeS, a mixed-chalcogen analogue of 2H-NbSe2 in which random Se/S substitution suppresses long-range CDW order while preserving the layered crystal structure P63/mmc. The material becomes superconducting below 6.0 K with moderate magnetic anisotropy. The upper critical field exhibits a pronounced upward curvature that cannot be described within a single-band framework but is well captured by a dirty-limit two-band model with a large diffusivity ratio. This indicates strong band-dependent scattering. The in-plane upper critical field exceeds the weak-coupling Pauli limit. Measurements of the lower critical field, superfluid density, and electronic specific heat are consistent with an interpretation of a fully gapped superconducting state with two nodeless gaps of different magnitudes.

AI.tldr: 通过研究混合硫族元素化合物2H-NbSeS（它抑制了长程CDW序但保留了晶体结构），发现其超导特性无法用单带模型解释，而脏极限两带模型可以很好地描述上临界场的上翘曲线、超过Pauli极限的面内上临界场以及全能隙的两带超导态，揭示了2H-NbSe2中超导与CDW竞争的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 2H-NbSe2的超导性质存在争议：ARPES证据支持多带超导，而STM数据指向强各向异性单带超导，但CDW序会重构费米面并修改超导能隙分布，使得区分本征多带配对与CDW相关效应变得困难。为了厘清这一问题，研究者通过研究CDW被抑制的类似物2H-NbSeS来揭示本征超导性质。
AI.method: 制备单晶2H-NbSeS（Se/S随机替代抑制长程CDW序），测量其超导转变温度（Tc≈6.0 K）、磁各向异性、上临界场（Hc2）和下临界场（Hc1）、超流密度及电子比热，并用脏极限两带模型拟合上临界场数据。
AI.result: 1. 上临界场呈现明显的上翘曲线，无法用单带框架描述，但脏极限两带模型（大扩散系数比）能完美拟合，表明存在强带依赖散射。2. 面内上临界场超过弱耦合Pauli极限。3. 下临界场、超流密度和电子比热数据一致支持一个具有两个不同大小无节点能隙的全能隙超导态。
AI.conclusion: 2H-NbSeS是一个本征的双带超导体，两个能隙均为无节点的全打开能隙。这为理解2H-NbSe2家族中CDW与超导的相互作用提供了关键参照，支持2H-NbSe2中多带超导特征可能部分归因于CDW效应，但本征配对机制仍涉及多带特性。

title: Topological spectral form factor reveals emergent non-Hermitian single-particle $\mathcal{PT}$ transitions from many-body quantum chaos
summary: In equilibrium physics, topological defect insertions in quantum and classical partition functions provide non-perturbative probes of phase transitions beyond local observables. In non-equilibrium physics, the spectral form factor provides a minimal probe of universal quantum dynamics, and admits a representation as a product of two partition functions at imaginary inverse temperature. We define the topological spectral form factor (TopSFF) by inserting topological defects acting non-trivially on the doubled partition functions, producing mismatched spacetime world-sheet topologies. For the minimal $\mathbb{Z}_2$ spatially extended defect, implemented by the global swap operator, we derive an exact mapping of the TopSFF of a generic 1D many-body chaotic system to an emergent $(3+1)$D non-Hermitian single-particle problem describing a temporal domain wall (tDW). We show analytically that the effective tDW dynamics undergoes a $\mathcal{PT}$ symmetry breaking transition at a finite interaction strength $ε_{\mathrm{EP}}$: below $ε_{\mathrm{EP}}$, the leading modes are polarized into Gaussian or non-Gaussian tDW sectors and the TopSFF varies monotonically and exponentially with system size; above $ε_{\mathrm{EP}}$, the tDW sectors hybridize and the TopSFF oscillates with system size; at the exceptional point $ε_{\mathrm{EP}}$, Jordan non-diagonality produces a linear-in-system-size enhancement. For temporally extended topological defects, we derive exact universal scaling forms for the TopSFF free energy in systems with time reversal or time translation symmetry, and verify them numerically in independent models.

AI.tldr: 本文定义了拓扑谱形因子(TopSFF)，通过在配分函数中插入拓扑缺陷来探测非平衡量子动力学的普适行为。对于1D混沌系统，TopSFF映射到(3+1)D非厄米单粒子问题，揭示了PT对称性破缺转变，并推导了时间反演/平移对称性下的普适标度形式。
AI.motivation: 传统平衡态物理中，拓扑缺陷插入提供了超越局域可观测量的非微扰探针。作者希望将类似思想引入非平衡领域，利用谱形因子这一最小探针，通过拓扑缺陷的插入来揭示更丰富的量子动力学信息。
AI.method: 在谱形因子的双份配分函数表示中插入拓扑缺陷，产生失配的时空世界面拓扑。对于最小的Z₂空间扩展缺陷（全局交换算符），推导出1D混沌系统的TopSFF到(3+1)D非厄米单粒子问题（时间畴壁）的精确映射。利用PT对称性分析和Jordan非对角性，解析地刻画了不同区域的标度行为。
AI.result: 发现有效时间畴壁动力学在有限相互作用强度ε_EP处发生PT对称性破缺转变：低于ε_EP时，主模极化为高斯/非高斯畴壁，TopSFF随系统尺寸单调指数变化；高于ε_EP时，畴壁杂化，TopSFF随系统尺寸振荡；在奇异点处，Jordan非对角性导致线性于系统尺寸的增强。对于时间扩展缺陷，推导了时间反演/平移对称性下的普适标度形式并数值验证。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑缺陷插入为谱形因子提供了新的探针维度，揭示了非平衡量子动力学中PT对称性破缺、奇异点行为及普适标度律，为理解混沌量子系统的普适动力学提供了新视角。

title: Controlling magnetic domain walls with supercurrents
summary: Establishing a versatile, fast and reliable magnetic memory technology is a giant bottleneck for cryogenic computing since present-day room-temperature solutions either cease to work or consume too much power. The long-term goal of superconducting spintronics has been to overcome this bottleneck by generating magnetic memories with equal-spin triplet supercurrent driven through them to control their magnetization direction. This path has been hampered by the short spin relaxation length and strong anisotropy in ferromagnets. Here we show how the supercurrent driven generation of spin accumulation in a superconductor/magnetic insulator bilayer, together with Gilbert damping of magnetization lead to a motion of magnetic domain walls. This manifests as a local voltage across the wall, which allows its position to be identified. Associated with this voltage and the current, there is Joule power which is dissipated via the Gilbert damping. The power required to maintain domain wall motion is orders of magnitude smaller than in the normal state, where most of the power is wasted in producing the current.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超导/磁性绝缘体双层结构中超流驱动自旋积累和吉尔伯特阻尼实现磁畴壁运动的新型超导自旋电子学记忆机制，其功耗比传统方案低数个数量级。
AI.motivation: 低温计算缺乏快速、可靠、低功耗的磁存储器技术，因为室温解决方案在低温下失效或功耗过高。超导自旋电子学长期致力于通过等自旋三重态超流驱动磁记忆，但受限于铁磁体中自旋弛豫长度短和强各向异性。
AI.method: 在超导/磁性绝缘体双层结构中，利用超流驱动产生的自旋积累与吉尔伯特阻尼的耦合，诱导磁畴壁运动，并通过畴壁上的局域电压来识别其位置。
AI.result: 实现了超流驱动的磁畴壁运动，该运动可通过畴壁上的局域电压进行检测；维持畴壁运动所需的焦耳功耗比正常态下低数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 这种超流驱动磁畴壁机制为低温超导自旋电子学存储器提供了可行且极低功耗的解决方案，克服了传统铁磁体方案的瓶颈。

title: Bidirectional motion of antiferromagnetic skyrmions driven by competing spin torques
summary: Antiferromagnetic skyrmions are swirling topological spin textures with rich dynamics and intriguing transport properties, yet their bidirectional dynamics remain largely unexplored. Here, we investigate the dynamics of antiferromagnetic skyrmions driven by current-induced spin-transfer and spin-orbit torques. We computationally demonstrate that antiferromagnetic skyrmions moving in one direction at low current densities can reverse their motion direction when the driving current is above a threshold. Based on the Thiele approach analysis, we show that this bidirectional motion originates from a change in the relative strengths of two effective forces arising from spin-transfer and spin-orbit torques. Furthermore, exploiting this bidirectional motion on a single racetrack, we design programmable logic gates. Our results not only uncover a hidden mechanism for bidirectional skyrmion motion but also facilitate the development of antiferromagnet-based logic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算和理论分析发现，反铁磁斯格明子在电流驱动下可呈现双向运动——低电流密度时朝一个方向运动，超过阈值电流后反向运动。该现象源于自旋转移矩和自旋轨道矩两种有效力的相对强度变化，并可用于设计可编程逻辑门。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁斯格明子具有丰富的动力学特性和有趣的输运性质，但其双向动力学机制尚未被充分探索，作者旨在揭示这一隐藏机制并推动反铁磁逻辑器件发展。
AI.method: 采用微磁学计算模拟自旋转移矩和自旋轨道矩驱动的反铁磁斯格明子动力学，并结合Thiele分析方法从理论上解释双向运动的物理机制。
AI.result: 发现反铁磁斯格明子在低电流密度下单方向运动，超过阈值电流后运动方向反转；双向运动源于自旋转移矩和自旋轨道矩两种有效力相对强度的变化；基于此设计了单赛道上的可编程逻辑门。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了反铁磁斯格明子双向运动的新机制，为开发基于反铁磁体的逻辑器件提供了理论基础和设计思路。

title: Role of Local Structural Variation in X-ray Photoelectron Spectrum of Silicon Oxide Interfaces
summary: We show that the broad X-ray photoelectron lines of silicon oxide on silicon arise from a continuous statistical distribution of core-level binding energies. Statistical simulations spanning compositions from Si to SiO$_2$ reproduce the full extent of this broadening, reaching 5 eV for SiO$_{1.0}$ , in quantitative agreement with 0.23 nm layer-resolved spectra reconstructed from Ar$^+$ sputtering data. This continuous distribution blurs distinct spectral fingerprints of local structural motifs, thereby challenging conventional chemical state assignment in oxide X-ray photoelectron spectra.

AI.tldr: 本文发现硅氧化物宽X射线光电子谱线源于核心能级结合能的连续统计分布，统计模拟从Si到SiO₂的成分范围可重现5 eV的展宽（SiO₁.₀时达最大），与Ar⁺溅射数据重建的0.23 nm层分辨谱定量吻合。该连续分布模糊了局部结构 motifs 的独特光谱特征，挑战了氧化物XPS中传统的化学状态指认方法。
AI.motivation: 解释硅氧化物XPS中观测到的异常宽谱线现象，质疑传统化学状态指认的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用统计模拟方法，覆盖Si到SiO₂的连续成分范围，并与Ar⁺溅射实验重建的0.23 nm深度分辨谱进行定量对比验证。
AI.result: 谱线展宽可达5 eV（SiO₁.₀时），统计模型与实验数据定量吻合；宽谱线掩盖了局部结构特征。
AI.conclusion: 传统XPS化学状态指认方法在氧化物体系中存在根本性局限，需引入连续分布模型来合理解释谱线展宽。

title: Polarized neutron scattering as a probe for vortex-type spin correlations in iron oxide multicore assemblies
summary: We report an experimental investigation of the magnetic microstructure of iron oxide multicore assemblies by means of polarized small-angle neutron scattering (SANS). Guided by a recently developed analytical theory for vortex-state magnetic nanoparticles, we provide a quantitative comparison between the measured and calculated cross sections, revealing signatures that are consistent with vortex-type magnetization configurations at low applied magnetic fields. In particular, the field evolution and the characteristic isotropic ring-type feature of the spin-flip scattering intensity at intermediate momentum transfers are in line with the formation of flux-closure states. The latter are stabilized by the interplay of exchange, Zeeman, and magnetostatic energies. The methodology allows for a statistically significant characterization of vortex states in densely packed nanoparticle systems, thereby complementing surface-sensitive techniques that are commonly limited to the observation of spin structures in individual particles.

AI.tldr: 本文利用极化小角中子散射研究了氧化铁多核组装的磁微结构，通过对比理论与实验截面，发现低场下涡旋型磁化构型的证据，为密集纳米粒子体系中涡旋态的表征提供了统计上有意义的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有表面敏感技术局限于观察单个粒子的自旋结构，缺乏对密集堆积纳米粒子系统中涡旋态进行统计意义上表征的方法。
AI.method: 采用极化小角中子散射（SANS）实验测量，并结合最近发展的涡旋态磁性纳米粒子解析理论进行定量对比分析。
AI.result: 在低外加磁场下观察到与涡旋型磁化构型一致的散射特征，尤其是自旋翻转散射强度在中程动量转移处的各向同性环状特征及其场演化，表明形成了磁通闭合态。
AI.conclusion: 交换能、塞曼能和静磁能的相互作用稳定了通量闭合态，该方法能够对密集纳米粒子系统中的涡旋态进行具有统计显著性的表征，弥补了单粒子表面技术的不足。

title: Solution gate control of shallow silicon vacancy charge states in diamond
summary: Silicon-vacancy (SiV) centers in diamond combine near-infrared emission with solid-state robustness, but their performance hinges on isolating favorable defect charge states. We demonstrate static and dynamic control of ultra-shallow (<15 nm) SiV ensembles in type IIa diamond. By combining low-energy ion implantation with tailored oxygen and hydrogen terminations, we map regimes that maximise the fluorescent SiV- population over dark charge states. We then realize reversible SiV- to SiV0 conversion using aqueous electrolytic gating with sub-200 mV biases and low optical powers. Our results enable low-power electrical control of SiV ensembles for integrated quantum photonics and biologically compatible voltage imaging in the near-infrared.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过低能离子注入和表面终端修饰，在IIa型金刚石中实现超浅SiV色心 ensembles的静态和动态电荷态控制，并利用电解门控实现可逆的SiV-到SiV0转换，为集成量子光子学和生物相容性电压成像提供了低功耗电控方案。
AI.motivation: SiV色心在金刚石中性能优异，但其电荷态稳定性是关键瓶颈，尤其是超浅层SiV的电荷态调控尚未得到充分研究，这限制了其在量子光子学和生物成像中的应用。
AI.method: 采用低能离子注入结合氧/氢终端修饰实现静态控制；利用水性电解门控实现动态可逆的SiV- ↔ SiV0转换，所需偏压低于200 mV，光功率低。
AI.result: 成功绘制了最大化荧光SiV-种群的参数区间；实现了超低电压（<200 mV）下的可逆电荷态转换。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为SiV色心在低功耗量子光子集成和近红外生物电压成像中的应用铺平了道路。

title: Cavity Enhanced Superconductivity
summary: Vacuum electromagnetic fluctuations have recently emerged as a promising means of controlling collective quantum phases. Although cavity-induced modifications of superconductivity have been widely predicted, experimental studies have so far reported only suppression of superconducting properties. Here, by carefully tuning a terahertz cavity to resonate with key phononic modes in few-layer niobium diselenide (NbSe2), we demonstrate cavity-enhanced superconductivity in few-layer NbSe2 coupled to a complementary split-ring resonator. In trilayer NbSe2, the superconducting transition temperature increases by ~10%, from 3.02 K to 3.41 K, when coupled to a cavity resonant at 2.04 THz. The enhancement exhibits a clear spatial dependence following the cavity field profile and a non-monotonic frequency dependence, with maximal enhancement near 2 THz. These results provide experimental evidence that vacuum electromagnetic fields can enhance superconductivity and establish cavity engineering as a powerful platform for tailoring quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 通过将太赫兹腔调谐到NbSe2的关键声子模式，实现了腔增强超导，使三层NbSe2的超导转变温度从3.02K提升至3.41K（~10%），并表现出空间依赖性和非单调频率依赖性。
AI.motivation: 尽管腔诱导的超导改性被广泛预测，但实验研究此前仅报告了超导性能的抑制，作者希望利用真空电磁涨落来增强超导性。
AI.method: 将少层NbSe2耦合到互补开口谐振环上，精确调谐太赫兹腔以共振于关键声子模式，测量超导转变温度的变化。
AI.result: 三层NbSe2的超导转变温度从3.02K提升至3.41K（~10%），增强具有空间依赖性（遵循腔场分布）和非单调频率依赖性（在~2THz处最大）。
AI.conclusion: 真空电磁场可以增强超导性，腔工程为调控量子材料提供了强大的平台。

title: Electron state tomography from quasiparticle interference maps
summary: Characterizing electronic band structures requires precise knowledge of wave functions and their quantum geometry. Here, we introduce a tomography method to reconstruct the density matrix of electron states from quasiparticle interference maps around single impurities. We consider two-orbital models on a honeycomb lattice, relevant to graphene heterostructures and direct-gap semiconductors. For on-site impurities, backscattering between time-reversed states directly maps the density matrix populations and coherences into distinct orbital contributions in the interference map. While local probes usually lack orbital resolution, these orbital contributions transform under distinct symmetry group representations and can thus be disentangled to reveal the density matrix and quantum geometric tensor of the scattering states. This establishes impurities as tomographic probes for band structures in scanning tunneling microscopy using conventional, unpolarized tips.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种断层扫描方法，通过分析单个杂质周围的准粒子干涉图样，重构电子态密度矩阵，从而表征能带结构的量子几何性质。
AI.motivation: 精确表征电子能带结构需要了解波函数及其量子几何，但现有局域探针缺乏轨道分辨能力。
AI.method: 在蜂窝晶格（石墨烯异质结、直接带隙半导体）的两轨道模型中，利用杂质引起的背散射效应，通过轨道在不同对称群表示下的变换特性，从干涉图中解耦出密度矩阵与量子几何张量。
AI.result: 实现了利用常规非极化STM探针，通过杂质作为断层扫描探针来揭示能带结构信息。
AI.conclusion: 杂质可作为STM中的断层扫描探针，无需极化尖端即可获得密度矩阵和量子几何张量，为能带结构表征提供了新方法。

title: First-Principles Study of Novel Lead-Free Double Perovskite \b{eta}2SnGeX6 (\b{eta} = K, Rb; X = Cl, Br, I) for thermomechanical, optoelectronic and outstanding thermoelectric applications
summary: In this study, the structural, mechanical, electronic, optical, and thermoelectric properties of the novel lead-free halide double perovskite series beta2SnGeX6 (beta = K, Rb; X = Cl, Br, I) are systematically investigated using density functional theory (DFT). Calculated formation energies, Tolerance factors, and octahedral factors confirm that all six compounds exhibit robust thermodynamic stability within a highly symmetric cubic geometry. Mechanical analysis derived from elastic parameters characterizes the entire series as fundamentally ductile, ensuring high processing elasticity and resistance to micro-cracking during device manufacturing. Electronic band structures reveal direct bandgaps showing exceptional composition-dependent tunability from 1.44 eV down to 0.64 eV via progressive halogen substitution. The wide gap chloride variations are optimized for single-junction photovoltaic absorbers, while the narrower-gap bromide and iodide analogs show immense promise for tandem solar architectures and near-infrared photodetectors. Thermoelectrically, heavy constituent atoms introduce strong lattice anharmonicity and intense high-temperature Umklapp phonon scattering, significantly suppressing lattice thermal conductivity. Combined with low carrier effective masses that optimize electrical transport, the iodide compounds achieve higher power factors and outstanding dimensionless figures of merit (ZT = 2.4 for K2SnGeI6 at 1000 K). Ultimately, these lead-free double perovskite family emerges as an environmentally benign and versatile platform for next-generation green optoelectronics and solid-state waste-heat recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT计算系统研究了新型无铅卤化物双钙钛矿系列β2SnGeX6 (β=K, Rb; X=Cl, Br, I)的结构、力学、电子、光学和热电性能。所有六种化合物均表现出稳定的立方几何结构、良好延展性、可调的直接带隙(0.64-1.44 eV)。其中碘化物在1000K下达到优异热电优值ZT=2.4，展现出在绿色光电子和废热回收领域的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 寻找环境友好、无毒的无铅卤化物双钙钛矿材料，替代传统含铅钙钛矿，用于下一代绿色光电子器件和热电能源转换。
AI.method: 基于密度泛函理论(DFT)的第一性原理计算，系统分析结构稳定性、力学性能、电子能带结构、光学吸收以及热电输运性质。
AI.result: 所有化合物热力学稳定且呈延性；带隙在0.64-1.44 eV间连续可调；碘化物化合物K2SnGeI6在1000K时获得ZT=2.4的优异热电性能。
AI.conclusion: 该无铅双钙钛矿家族是兼具环境友好性和多功能性的材料平台，有望应用于绿色光电子和固态废热回收领域。

title: Theory of In-Plane Orbital Magnetization with Layer Hybridization
summary: The modern theory of orbital magnetization successfully describes the response of Bloch electrons to magnetic fields in fully periodic crystals, but it does not directly address the distinct regime of an in-plane field in multilayer systems with layer hybridization. Coherent interlayer tunneling allows electrons to form circulating current loops, producing an in-plane orbital response that is absent in a strictly two-dimensional limit and qualitatively different from the conventional three-dimensional one. Here we develop a theory of in-plane orbital magnetization for this {\it transdimensional} regime, where the layer thickness is comparable to the vertical mean free path. Starting from the current-loop picture, we construct the in-plane orbital angular momentum operator and derive exact expressions for the orbital magnetic moment and the in-plane orbital magnetic susceptibility. As an application, we predict a gate-tunable in-plane orbital magnetoelectric effect in layered materials. Our framework establishes a general foundation for in-plane orbital responses and suggests new opportunities for orbitronics in layer-hybridized quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对层状材料中面内轨道磁化强度的理论框架，该理论适用于层间隧穿使得电子形成循环电流的"跨维度"体系，并推导了轨道磁矩和磁化率的精确表达式，预言了可栅压调控的面内轨道磁电效应。
AI.motivation: 现有轨道磁化理论适用于完全周期晶体中的Bloch电子，但无法处理层状材料中由相干层间隧穿引起面内轨道响应的独特机制（该机制既不同于纯二维极限，也不同于传统三维情况）。作者希望建立适用于层间杂化体系的统一理论。
AI.method: 从电流环图像出发，构建面内轨道角动量算符，推导轨道磁矩和面内轨道磁化率的精确表达式。该理论适用于层厚与垂直平均自由程相当的"跨维度"体系。
AI.result: 得到了面内轨道磁矩和磁化率的精确表达式，并预言了层状材料中可被栅极电压调控的面内轨道磁电效应。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为层间杂化量子材料中的面内轨道响应建立了通用基础，为轨道电子学（orbitronics）在层状材料中的应用提供了新的可能性。

title: Self-Aligned Metallic-Semiconducting Phosphorus Nanoarrays Driven by Facet Engineering
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) materials often require specific substrate terminations for epitaxial stabilization, yet the search for suitable templates has largely focused on low-index metal surfaces, which may not provide the optimal conditions for the growth of new phases. Here, we show that crystal-facet engineering on curved Cu surfaces enables the stabilization, within a single preparation step, of two distinct 2D phosphorus phases with different electronic properties. Hexagonal blue phosphorene forms on Cu(111) terraces, whereas a previously unreported skewed-square phosphorus phase is stabilized on Cu(513) facets. By combining complementary microscopy and spectroscopy techniques with theoretical calculations, we determine the structural and electronic properties of this new phase, which displays semiconducting character, in contrast to the metallic behavior of blue phosphorene. The coexistence of these two competing phases gives rise to a metal-to-semiconducting transition of the 2D phosphorus layer over the substrate. Locally, the competition between the two phases gives rise to self-aligned nanoarrays of alternating metallic and semiconducting phosphorus terraces. These results establish crystal-facet engineering as a practical route for discovering and stabilizing emergent 2D material phases on high-index substrates, while also enabling the engineering of nanostructures with tailored electronic properties through a simple and scalable growth process.

AI.tldr: 本文通过晶面工程在弯曲Cu表面一步法稳定了两种不同电子性质的二维磷相：六方蓝磷在Cu(111)台阶面形成，而新型斜方磷相在Cu(513)晶面稳定，两者共存导致金属-半导体转变并形成自对准纳米阵列。
AI.motivation: 传统二维材料外延生长主要关注低指数金属表面作为模板，但可能不是新相生长的最优条件，因此需要探索更有效的衬底工程策略来稳定新型二维材料相。
AI.method: 采用弯曲Cu表面进行晶面工程，结合互补显微术与光谱学技术以及理论计算，对两种二维磷相的结构和电子性质进行表征分析。
AI.result: 弯曲Cu表面一步法同时稳定了六方蓝磷（金属性）和新型斜方磷相（半导体性），两者共存导致二维磷层在衬底上呈现金属-半导体转变，并形成自对准的交替金属/半导体磷纳米阵列。
AI.conclusion: 晶面工程是在高指数衬底上发现和稳定新型二维材料相的实用途径，同时可通过简单可扩展的生长过程实现对具有定制电子性质的纳米结构进行工程化设计。

title: From Localized Packets to Plane Waves: A Time-Domain Approach to Transport in Mesoscopic Systems
summary: Quantum transport in mesoscopic systems is conventionally formulated within the Landauer--Büttiker scattering framework, where steady-state currents emerge from the transmission of plane waves representing propagating carriers.
